caribbean.headline: San Juan Faces Moderate Rain and Light Winds Today
caribbean.paragraph: San Juan is experiencing light northeast winds up to 14 knots with seas around 3.5 feet and a 10-second swell period from the NNE. Rain chances are elevated at 76 percent, indicating intermittent showers likely throughout the day.

mediterranean.headline: Mild Winds and Moderate Swells Affect Cadiz Today
mediterranean.paragraph: Cadiz is experiencing moderate southwest swells with a significant wave height of 2.9 feet and sustained winds up to 18 knots. Rain chances remain below 50 percent, while Mykonos sees slightly stronger winds at 21 knots but no significant wave action.
